ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lci_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LCI data record */,
  "input_description" TEXT /* Description of the input material or activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the LCI activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., production, transportation) */,
  "input_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the input material */,
  "output_description" TEXT /* Description of the output or result of the activity */,
  "output_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the output */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geography */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year or version of the data */,
  "data_quality_assessment" TEXT /* Comprehensive data quality assessment */,
  "data_quality_score" TEXT /* Numerical score to summarize the overall data quality */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lci_data_geography_id FOREIGN KEY ("geography_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geography_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lci_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., database, report, study) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source for easy reference */,
  "data_source_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  "data_source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geography */,
  "geography_name" TEXT /* Name of the geography */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geography */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate for the geography */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate for the geography */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone for the geography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality dimension */,
  "dimension_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality dimension */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality dimension */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight to assign to each dimension for overall data quality scoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LCI data record */,
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data quality dimension */,
  "assessment_score" TEXT /* Score of the data quality assessment */,
  "assessment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data quality assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the data quality assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES lci_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessments_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("dimension_id") REFERENCES data_quality_dimensions ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LCI data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES lci_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
